code: import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import"./WantedListView.scss";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const WantedListView=_ref=>{let{onClose}=_ref;const[wantedList,setWantedList]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);useEffect(()=>{const fetchWanted=async()=>{try{const response=await fetch("/api/wanted");const data=await response.json();setWantedList(data);}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching wanted list:",error);}finally{setLoading(false);}};fetchWanted();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"wanted-list-view",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"wanted-list-header",children:["Wanted List",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:onClose,className:"close-btn",children:"\u2716"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"wanted-list-content",children:loading?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"wanted-loading",children:"Loading..."}):wantedList.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"wanted-empty",children:"No wanted suspects found."}):wantedList.map(user=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"wanted-entry",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"wanted-avatar",style:{backgroundImage:`url(${user.avatar})`}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"wanted-info",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"wanted-name",children:user.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"wanted-crime",children:user.crimes.join(", ")}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"wanted-bounty",children:["\uD83D\uDCB0 $",user.bounty.toLocaleString()]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"wanted-lastseen",children:["Last seen: ",user.last_seen]})]})]},user.id))})]});};export default WantedListView;
